title: onagra chrysantha
intro: Onagra chrysantha, also known as California poppy or golden poppy, is a flowering plant native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. Onagra chrysantha has been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to its sedative and calming effects. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used as a topical treatment for skin irritations and wounds.
